name: Freedom Preserving Protocol — Trust & Handshake
description: Agent-to-agent trust graph with BFS propagation, constitutional handshake sequence, signed claims, Merkle audit bridging, and strict-mode signaling. Enables multi-agent verification of FPP adoption.

constitutionHash.description: SHA-256 of the constitution.json this agent has adopted. Used during handshake verification.

trustAttenuationFactor.description: Per-hop trust attenuation for BFS propagation. 0.8 means 20% reduction per hop.

handshakeTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) for a handshake session before it expires.

maxPropagationDepth.description: Maximum BFS depth for trust propagation (receiver-local policy).

propagationMinEdgeConfidence.description: Minimum per-edge confidence required for a hop to participate in propagation.

trustGraphPath.description: Path to the persisted trust graph JSON file.

identityKeyPath.description: Path to the Ed25519 identity key seed file (mode 0600). Generated on first run.

auditLogPath.description: Path to the constitution audit JSONL log for Merkle root computation.

fallbackAuditLogPath.description: Fallback audit JSONL when the primary auditLogPath has zero entries (default: enforcement plugin log). Set to null to disable. Handshake Merkle roots bootstrap from enforcement entries until constitution-audit has heartbeat/adoption entries.

receiptLogPath.description: Path to the typed conformance receipt ledger used for selective proof export and capsule receipt roots.

strictModeStatePath.description: Path to the strict-mode session state file read by the enforcement plugin.

verificationPolicy.description: Handshake verification policy. hardened-v2 (default) requires signed fresh v2 claims. v2-with-legacy-declarations allows inspecting v1 as declaration-only. legacy-unsafe is visibly weaker and accepts unsigned claims.

replayCachePath.description: Path to the bounded challenge replay-key cache.

requireSignedClaims.description: Deprecated in favor of verificationPolicy. Derived from policy when omitted.

requireMerkleProof.description: When true, handshake verification requires a valid Merkle proof of recent audit entries.

requireFreshness.description: Deprecated in favor of verificationPolicy. Derived from policy when omitted.

strictModeOnHandshakeFailure.description: When true, a failed or UNKNOWN handshake triggers strict mode for that session.

strictModeTtlMs.description: How long strict mode lasts (ms) before auto-expiring.

strictModeAddApprovalOn.description: Risk classifications that become require-approval during strict mode.

acknowledgeDangerousOverrides.description: Required to enable verificationPolicy=legacy-unsafe. Without this flag, legacy-unsafe fails closed to hardened-v2 and emits a migration diagnostic — the config file is never rewritten.

quorumPeerThreshold.description: Minimum aye ballots required to finalize a peer-quorum mandate. Local policy only — not constitutional ratification.

quorumStewardThreshold.description: Minimum aye ballots required to finalize a steward-quorum mandate. Steward-role keys only (Law 2).

quorumPeerEligibleIds.description: Agent IDs eligible to cast peer-quorum ballots.

quorumStewardEligibleIds.description: Agent IDs with steward role eligible for steward-quorum (and peer-quorum) ballots.

quorumMinStandingLevel.description: Optional minimum TrustLevel ordinal (0=UNKNOWN … 4=MAXIMUM) required to cast a ballot. Omit for no standing floor.

quorumProposalTtlMs.description: How long an open quorum proposal remains open before expiry (ms).

mandateStorePath.description: Shared path for StandingMandateV1 records issued by quorum finalize (consumed by the enforcement plugin).

stewardAuthorizationLedgerPath.description: Hash-chained OpenPGP steward authorization ledger (human CLI admit only; never agent-signed).

quorumStatePath.description: Path for open quorum proposal/ballot session state.
